description_long: This is a single-family detached house situated on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to a garage. The house features a simple, boxy structure with a gable roof and a small front porch. The exterior is predominantly white, with a dark roof and a paved driveway extending from the street to the garage. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible facades, and the property is bordered by a green lawn. The main entryway is accessible via a short walkway from the driveway, and the house appears to have one above-ground story. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A white, single-story house with a gable roof, garage, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage door, main entryway, and front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and the paved driveway extending from the street.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house, backyard area, and rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, garage, and side windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a small porch, single step, and direct access from the driveway.
